name: Klook Asia Travel Experiences API
what_it_does: Klook Asia-focused travel experiences REST API for travel platforms, airlines, hotels, and booking sites to access and sell 500,000+ activities, tours, transportation passes, SIM cards, theme park tickets, and travel essentials across Asia-Pacific and global destinations, with particular depth in Hong Kong, Japan, South Korea, Singapore, Taiwan, and Southeast Asia markets. Enables AI agents to manage activity search for Asia travel experience discovery automation, handle real-time availability for experience booking automation, access transportation pass booking for rail and transit automation, retrieve theme park ticket booking for attraction entry automation, manage SIM card and connectivity booking for travel tech automation, handle booking confirmation for experience reservation automation, access cancellation management for booking reversal automation, retrieve affiliate link generation for Asia travel monetization automation, manage multi-language content for localized booking automation, and integrate Klook with travel platforms, airlines, and OTAs for end-to-end Asia travel experience booking automation.
use_cases: Booking Japan rail passes and transit cards from Asia travel itinerary automation agents
Searching theme park tickets and attraction passes for Asia destination booking agents
Embedding Klook experiences in airline ancillary sale and hotel concierge automation agents
Generating affiliate links for Asia travel blog and content platform monetization agents
not_for: European or US-focused activity inventory (Viator/GetYourGuide have better Western depth)
Flight or hotel accommodation booking (Klook is activities and experiences only)
B2B MICE or group event management (Klook is retail/affiliate consumer experience)
best_when: A travel platform, airline, or OTA with Asia-Pacific audience wanting AI agents to book and display activities, transit passes, SIM cards, and experiences from Klook's deep Asia inventory through their affiliate and partner API.
avoid_when: PARTNER API REQUIRES REGIONAL AGREEMENT: Klook partner API requires approved partnership with Klook's regional office; automated self-service partner API access creates no credentials; automated global self-service assumption creates access blocked. AVAILABILITY IS REAL-TIME CAPACITY: Klook experiences have limited slots especially for popular Japan/Korea activities; automated booking without availability pre-check creates sold-out failure; automated search results as perpetually available creates high booking failure rate during peak periods. MULTI-CURRENCY PRICING COMPLEXITY: Klook operates in 20+ currencies with localized pricing; automated price display in home currency creates exchange rate mismatch from listed price; automated display must use currency matching user's booking region. TRANSPORT PASSES HAVE VALIDITY WINDOWS: Klook rail passes (JR Pass, T-money) have fixed validity periods from activation; automated transport pass booking must account for activation deadline; automated indefinite validity assumption creates expired pass at time of use.

auth.notes: Klook uses API key for partner authentication. REST API with JSON. Hong Kong HQ. Founded 2014 by Ethan Lin, Eric Gnock Fah, and Willix Halim. Backed by Softbank Vision Fund, Goldman Sachs, Sequoia China ($1.2B+ raised, $1B+ valuation). Products: Tours, activities, transport passes, SIM cards, theme parks, transfers. SDKs: None public. PDPO (HK), PDPA (Thailand), PDPB (India). 500,000+ activities in 290+ destinations. Asia-first OTA. Competes with Viator and GetYourGuide with stronger Asia coverage.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Affiliate program free; booking API via Klook partner program
pricing.paid_tiers: Affiliate commission: typically 8-12%; partner margin negotiated by region and volume
pricing.notes: Hong Kong HQ. SoftBank/Goldman/Sequoia backed. Commission partner model. Asia-Pacific focus.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key by partner tier; webhooks for booking lifecycle events

known_agent_gotchas: REAL-TIME AVAILABILITY FOR ASIA PEAK SEASON: Klook popular activities (Japan Shinkansen, Korea attractions) have instant sell-out during peak season; automated booking without availability check creates SOLD_OUT at booking; automated search-results-as-available creates high failure during Golden Week, cherry blossom season

TRANSPORT PASS VALIDITY FROM ACTIVATION: Klook JR Pass and rail passes have fixed validity from first use (7/14/21 days); automated pass booking must account for activation window; automated indefinite validity assumption creates expired pass if activation window missed

REGIONAL API ENDPOINT AND PARTNER AGREEMENT: Klook partner API agreements are regional (HK, SEA, KR, JP); automated single global API key assumption creates region-specific access failure; automated partner must obtain agreements for target regions

MULTI-CURRENCY LOCALIZED PRICING: Klook products priced in local currencies (JPY, KRW, HKD, SGD); automated USD-only price assumption creates currency mismatch for Asian inventory; automated must match display currency to booking market

SIM CARD AND PASS PHYSICAL DELIVERY: Some Klook products (SIM cards, physical vouchers) require pickup at destination counters or postal delivery; automated digital-only delivery assumption for physical products creates undelivered experience
agent_readiness.security_notes: Asia OTA. GDPR, PDPO, PDPA. API key. HK/SG/EU. Booking and traveler personal data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Asia travel OTA. GDPR, PDPO. API key. HK/SG/EU. Booking and traveler data.
